name: build-gate-visual-review
description: Generates HTML slide deck via html-ppt-skill for pre-build visual review

positive_triggers.input: Show me what we're about to build before any code
positive_triggers.reason: User wants visual confirmation before build

positive_triggers.input: Generate a slide deck review of the current project state

negative_triggers.reason: No UI, no visual gate needed

negative_triggers.input: Just write the code, no review needed

behavioral_evals.scenario: User asks: 'Show me what we're about to build'
expected_behavior: If not installed, agent prompts user with npx skills add URL or manual clone instructions
Agent compiles build-context.md from task_plan.md + spec.md + design-spec.md + findings.md summary
Agent loads html-ppt-skill via Skill tool
Agent authors slide deck from build-context.md (uses html-ppt-skill's themes/layouts)
Agent presents file path + how to open (browser file:// URL)
Agent waits for user approval before build phase

behavioral_evals.scenario: User says: 'Looks good, proceed to build'
expected_behavior: Agent records [build-gate] review → user: approve in progress.md
If user had said 'modify': agent updates spec/plan and regenerates deck

notes: v0.2.0 — replaced HTML Anything (self-hosted web service) with html-ppt-skill (installed AgentSkill). html-ppt-skill must be pre-installed in ~/.agents/skills/ by the user (not auto-installed by agent). Install: 'npx skills add https://github.com/lewislulu/html-ppt-skill' or manual git clone.
